CONTENT.Career: Cissé joined German club VfB Stuttgart in August 2020. He made his professional debut for the team in the Bundesliga on 19 September 2020, coming on as a substitute in the 78th minute for Roberto Massimo against SC Freiburg, which finished as a 3–2 home loss.On 16 January 2022, he was loaned out to Polish Ekstraklasa club Wisła Kraków until the end of June 2023.

SUMMARY: Alkhaly Momo Cissé (born 17 October 2002) is a Guinean professional footballer .
